# libznn

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/cmd/libznn"
```

Command libznn builds the C\-shared library variant of the node, exporting the znnd functionality through a stable C ABI.

### Overview

libznn is built with \`make libznn\` \(which invokes \`go build \-buildmode=c\-shared \-tags libznn ./cmd/libznn\`\). Other languages link against the resulting \`libznn.dll\`/\`.dylib\`/\`.so\` to embed a Zenon node.

Per\-command documentation is being filled in incrementally. See docs/STYLE.md for the full template applied in subsequent PRs.
